title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
summary: An exploration of human behavior that provides a practical framework for building positive routines and breaking negative ones through incremental, daily changes.

title: Dopamine Nation
author: Dr. Anna Lembke
summary: A deep dive into the neuroscience of reward, offering actionable strategies to manage consumption and find sustainable balance in a highly stimulating world.

title: Men Are from Mars, Women Are from Venus
author: John Gray
summary: A classic guide to understanding gender communication differences, offering practical strategies to improve relationships and emotional intelligence.
